user.title: Connect OpenJibo
user.description: Enter your OpenJibo server URL and optional local robot details. After setup, a pairing code will appear as a Home Assistant notification. Complete pairing in the OpenJibo portal.

data_description.server_url: The URL of your OpenJibo server, for example http://192.168.1.10:24605.
data_description.name: A friendly name for this OpenJibo connection.
data_description.jibo_ip: Optional local IP for direct TTS via the jibo.say service.

abort.already_configured: This OpenJibo connection is already configured.
